## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets the `dev` branch (not `main`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Changes are scoped to a single topic
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `pytest -q` is green (new bank format ⇒ a fixture test is included)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real bank data committed
